sourceTitle: Journal of Zhejiang University - Policy Statement and Author Disclosure Requirements for the Use of Generative AI
evidenceSnippetOriginal: 1. Principle of Human Authorship: Artificial intelligence (AI) or large language models (LLMs) cannot be listed as an author or co-author of a manuscript. Authorship and order of authors must be predicated on substantive intellectual contributions.
evidenceSnippetDisplay: AI and LLMs cannot be listed as authors or co-authors of a manuscript.
rightsNote: Official source page retains its original rights. Tracker metadata is open licensed; source text is quoted only as short evidence.
